de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class AbstractProblemLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProblemLoader, SingleThreadProblemLoader

    public abstract class AbstractProblemLoader
extends Object

    This class provides the basic functionality to load something in KeY. The loading process is done in the current Thread and no user interaction is required.

    The basic usage of this class is to instantiate a new SingleThreadProblemLoader or ProblemLoader instance which should load the file configured by the constructor's arguments. The next step is to call load() which does the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to apply rules again if possible. The result of the loading process is available via the getter methods.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult 

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile
      true to call UserInterfaceControl#selectProofObligation(InitConfig) if no Proof is defined by the loaded proof or false otherwise which still allows to work with the loaded InitConfig.
      private File bootClassPath
      An optional boot class path.
      private List<File> classPath
      The optional class path entries to use.
      private ProblemLoaderControl control
      The ProblemLoaderControl to use.
      private EnvInput envInput
      The instantiated EnvInput which describes the file to load.
      private File file
      The file or folder to load.
      private boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs
      true profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
      private List<File> includes
      The global includes to use.
      private InitConfig initConfig
      The instantiated InitConfig which provides access to the loaded source elements and specifications.
      private static Map<Pair<Integer,Integer>,String> mismatchErrors
      Maps internal error codes of the parser to human readable strings.
      private static Map<Integer,String> missedErrors 
      private Properties poPropertiesToForce
      Some optional additional Properties for the PO.
      private ProblemInitializer problemInitializer
      The instantiated ProblemInitializer used during the loading process.
      private Profile profileOfNewProofs
      The Profile to use for new Proofs.
      private Proof proof
      The instantiate proof or null if no proof was instantiated during loading process.
      private AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result
      The AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult if available or null otherwise.

        private final File file
        The file or folder to load.

        An optional boot class path.

      • includes

        private final List<File> includes
        The global includes to use.

        private final ProblemLoaderControl control
        The ProblemLoaderControl to use.

      • profileOfNewProofs

        private final Profile profileOfNewProofs
        The Profile to use for new Proofs.

      • askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile

        private final boolean askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile
        true to call UserInterfaceControl#selectProofObligation(InitConfig) if no Proof is defined by the loaded proof or false otherwise which still allows to work with the loaded InitConfig.

      • poPropertiesToForce

        private final Properties poPropertiesToForce
        Some optional additional Properties for the PO.

      • forceNewProfileOfNewProofs

        private final boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs
        true profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.

      • envInput

        private EnvInput envInput
        The instantiated EnvInput which describes the file to load.

      • problemInitializer

        private ProblemInitializer problemInitializer
        The instantiated ProblemInitializer used during the loading process.

      • initConfig

        private InitConfig initConfig
        The instantiated InitConfig which provides access to the loaded source elements and specifications.

      • proof

        private Proof proof
        The instantiate proof or null if no proof was instantiated during loading process.

      • result

        private AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result
        The AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult if available or null otherwise.

      • mismatchErrors

        private static final Map<Pair<Integer,Integer>,String> mismatchErrors
        Maps internal error codes of the parser to human readable strings. The integers refer to the common MismatchedTokenExceptions, where one token is expected and another is found. Both are usually only referred to by their internal code.

      • missedErrors

        private static final Map<Integer,String> missedErrors

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractProblemLoader

        public AbstractProblemLoader(File file,
                             List<File> classPath,
                             File bootClassPath,
                             List<File> includes,
                             Profile profileOfNewProofs,
                             boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs,
                             ProblemLoaderControl control,
                             boolean askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile,
                             Properties poPropertiesToForce)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        file - The file or folder to load.
        classPath - The optional class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - An optional boot class path.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        profileOfNewProofs - The Profile to use for new Proofs.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        control - The ProblemLoaderControl to use.
        askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile - true to call UserInterfaceControl#selectProofObligation(InitConfig) if no Proof is defined by the loaded proof or false otherwise which still allows to work with the loaded InitConfig.

    • Method Detail

      • load

        public void load()
          throws ProofInputException,
                 IOException,
                 ProblemLoaderException
        Executes the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to re-apply rules on it if possible.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
        IOException - Occurred Exception.
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • unwrap

        private Throwable unwrap(Throwable e)
        Find first 'non-wrapper' exception type in cause chain.

      • recoverParserErrorMessage

        protected ProblemLoaderException recoverParserErrorMessage(Exception e)
        Tries to recover parser errors and make them human-readable, rewrap them into ProblemLoaderExceptions.

      • createProofObligationContainer

        protected IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer createProofObligationContainer()
                                                                   throws IOException
        Creates a IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer if available which contains the ProofOblInput for which a Proof should be instantiated.
        Returns:
        The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer or null if not available.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • createProof

        protected ProofAggregate createProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer)
                              throws ProofInputException
        Creates a Proof for the given IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer and tries to apply rules again.
        Parameters:
        poContainer - The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer to instantiate a Proof for.
        Returns:
        The instantiated Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
